scripts.build:worker: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.d1:migration:create: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler d1 migrations create DB
scripts.d1:migrate:local: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local
scripts.d1:migrate:staging: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env staging --remote
scripts.d1:migrate:production: WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --env production --remote
scripts.smoke:staging: test -n "$STAGING_HOST" && curl -fsS "https://$STAGING_HOST/api/health" && curl -fsS "https://$STAGING_HOST/api/leaderboard" && curl -fsS -X POST "https://$STAGING_HOST/api/scan" -H "content-type: application/json" --data "{\"repoUrl\":\"https://github.com/cloudflare/workers-sdk\"}"
scripts.deploy:staging:smoke: npm run deploy:staging && npm run smoke:staging
